title: Mounted Local Studio Audit API
summary: Moved the active Studio audit health, registry, and run endpoints into the local Studio app server while preserving the existing allowlisted audit runner.
effect: Studio Audits no longer requires the standalone audit service during normal local Studio sessions. The local app owns `/studio/api/audits/...`, `bin/dev-studio` skips the old sibling process by default, and the standalone script remains available for fallback/debug runs.
